title: dryopteris subincisa var. canescens
intro: Dryopteris subincisa var. canescens, also known as canescens autumn fern or autumn fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris subincisa species, a type of fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of canescens autumn fern include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce blood sugar levels, and aid in digestion, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Canescens autumn fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also sometimes used in traditional cooking and as a garnish for dishes.
